diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,136 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that initializes routers and provides routing functionality
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema
+- Simple note: Default router is SmartRouter with RegExpRouter fallback and TrieRouter
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Core Hono implementation with request handling, middleware support, and routing
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, compose, Context, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, MiddlewareHandler, RouterRoute, Router, get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use, HonoOptions, router, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, route, basePath, onError, notFound, mount, addRoute, handle, dispatch, fetch, request, fire, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, H, ErrorHandler, FetchEventLike, Next, NotFoundHandler
+- Simple note: Main Hono framework implementation with routing, middleware, and request handling via dispatch and compose
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Re-exports PatternRouter from router.ts
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter
+- Simple note: Thin index export file
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Pattern-based routing using compiled regular expressions for matching paths
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route, emptyParams, add, match, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError
+- Simple note: Converts path patterns to regex at add time, matches against compiled expressions in match
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Re-exports LinearRouter from router.ts
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter
+- Simple note: Thin index export file
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Linear path matching with support for named parameters and wildcards via character-by-character traversal
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, ROUTES_LOOP, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, RegExpMatchArrayWithIndices, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe, hasStar, hasLabel, params, lastIndex, name, value, part, index, pos, j, len, i
+- Simple note: Iterative route matching that checks each segment sequentially, supports parameter extraction and wildcard matching
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Re-exports RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter class
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter
+- Simple note: Factory exports for creating RegExpRouter instances
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: RegExp router using trie structure during add phase and precompiled regex for high-performance matching
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, nullMatcher, wildcardRegExpCache, buildWildcardRegExp, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, buildRegExp, findMiddleware, Matcher, Parameter, StaticMap, MatcherMap, PATH_ERROR, paramCount, paramAssoc, captureIndex, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap, index, len, i, j, k
+- Simple note: Two-phase approach: builds trie during add, generates single regex during buildAllMatchers for match
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Matches requests against precompiled regex matchers with static route matching optimized
+- Names noticed: match, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, emptyParam, METHOD_NAME_ALL, ParamIndexMap, Result, Router, ParamStash
+- Simple note: Tests static routes first, then regex if no static match found
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Pre-compiled RegExp router serialized as string for use in worker scripts or environments without module support
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, RelocateMap, matcher, staticMap, all, Matcher, ParamIndexMap
+- Simple note: Takes paths array, builds matchers and relocateMap, returns serializable constructor arguments
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie node implementation for building regex-based route trees
+- Names noticed: Node, Context, PATH_ERROR, ParamAssocArray, varIndex, children, insert, buildRegExpStr, compareKey, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, openBracePos, lookahead, restPath, match
+- Simple note: Tree structure that builds regex components, tracks parameter indices via context
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie data structure for organizing routes into regex-based matching tree
+- Names noticed: Trie, Node, Context, ParamAssocArray, PathError, ReplacementMap, captureIndex, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap, groups, token, path, regexp
+- Simple note: Converts paths to tokens, creates regex string from tree structure, maps capture indices
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Re-exports SmartRouter from router.ts
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter
+- Simple note: Thin index export file
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Fallback router delegating to multiple underlying routers in sequence
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, routers, routes, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, add, match, name, activeRouter
+- Simple note: Auto-detects best strategy by trying each router until one matches
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Re-exports TrieRouter from router.ts
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Thin index export file
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Trie-based routing with tree traversal for matching requests
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, checkOptionalParameter, insert, match, search
+- Simple note: Builds and traverses tree structure for exact match with parameter extraction support
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie node with search algorithm using breadth-first traversal and breadth-first queue for pattern matching
+- Names noticed: Node, emptyParams, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, possibleKeys, score, children, methods, order, params, curNode, curNodes, tempNodes, parts, handlerSets, isLast, pattern, matcher, child, hasChildren, astNode, pushHandlerSets
+- Simple note: Tree node with score-based handler selection, extracts parameters, handles wildcards and regex patterns via search
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for
